Container.Name: wg-gateway
Container.Overview:
WireGuard VPN gateway with integrated rule-based proxy engine.
Connects WireGuard clients and routes all traffic through a proxy/direct engine (Mihomo) that applies per-rule routing decisions. Includes web UIs for both WireGuard peer management (wg-easy) and proxy rule configuration.
IMPORTANT: Requires capabilities and a device that Unraid cannot set through the template alone. After adding the container, edit it and add to "Extra Parameters": --cap-add NET_ADMIN --cap-add SYS_MODULE --device /dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun

Config.Name: Server Public IP
Config.Description: Public IP or hostname of this server (required for WireGuard client config)

Config.Name: Proxy Engine Port
Config.Description: Proxy engine Web UI / API port

Config.Name: DNS for Clients
Config.Description: DNS servers advertised to WireGuard clients

Config.Name: WireGuard Data
Config.Description: Persistent WireGuard configuration and peer data
